race.comment: IRAMA (2) loves it here around this circuit with a win and a second from just two spins and will find this easier than recent Saturday metro outings. Sure to be at peak fitness for this and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Rates the testing material. KNOWITALL FRANK (9) has come back in fine fashion with a win and two runner-up finishes from three starts this time in work and is another to get some weight off. Should be right there at the business end. NORTY FORTY (12) wasn't disgraced at Listed level last time out and will appreciate the sharp drop back in company here. Has to be included. CHEERFUL CAT (16) has been improving with racing of late and is a must for the multiples. KIDS INTHE KITCHEN (8) next in line with Lerena in the stirrups.
